docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MOHAMMAD, NADIA AS TO DEFENDANT KNAPP, RYAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $140) SERVED DEC-10-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KNAPP, RYAN
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF NADIA MOHAMMAD IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT RYAN KNAPP IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-30-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NADIA MOHAMMAD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RYAN KNAPP IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $6677 TO THE PLAINTIFF, MADE IN 2 PAYMENTS OF $3338.50. PAYMENTS ARE DUE ELECTRONICALLY BY FEB-18 AND MAR-18-2022. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MAR-30-2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE AND ADDING PUNITIVE AWARD WILL BE CONSIDERED. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
